title: Get the balance of a BC
content:
Use this endpoint to obtain the balance of a Business Center. Both Agency and Direct Business Centers are able to perform payment-related operations. > **Note**
Only users with Finance Manager or Finance Analyst permission can manage payments and invoices in a Business Center. You can use [/bc/member/invite/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739939455765505) and [/bc/member/update/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739696704424961) to configure or update access settings for members. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/bc/balance/get/| /v1.3/bc/balance/get/| |Request parameter data type|`bc_id`: number |`bc_id`: string | |New request parameters|/|`payment_portfolio_id`| |Response parameter data type|`bc_id`: number |`bc_id`: string | |New response parameters|/|`payment_portfolio_type`| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/balance/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required}|string| Business Center ID。 | |payment_portfolio_id|string|The ID of the Payment Portfolio.

To retrieve the list of Payment Portfolios that belong to the same client as the Business Center, use [/payment_portfolio/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1839151931301954).| ``` ### Example ``` xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --get -H "Access-Token:xxx" \ --data-urlencode "bc_id=BC_ID" \ https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/balance/get/ (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field {40%}|Data Type{10%}|Description{50%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id |string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request | |data |object|Return data.

Note: If the Business Center has enabled Payment Portfolio, the following parameters will be for the Payment Portfolio rather than the Business Center:

  • `account_balance`
  • `valid_account_balance`
  • `frozen_balance`
  • `tax`
  • `cash_balance`
  • `valid_cash_balance`
  • `payment_portfolio_type`
| #|bc_id |string| Business Center ID. | #|currency |string|The currency of the Business Center. For supported currencies, see [Appendix-Currency](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737585839634433) | #|account_balance |number|Business Center total balance, rounded to two decimal places | #|valid_account_balance |number|Business Center valid account balance, rounded to two decimal places | #|frozen_balance |number| Business Center freeze balance, rounded to two decimal places | #|tax |number| Business Center tax, rounded to two decimal places | #|cash_balance|number| Business Center cash balance, rounded to two decimal places | #|valid_cash_balance|number| Business Center valid cash balance, rounded to two decimal places | #|grant_balance |number| Business Center coupon/voucher balance, rounded to two decimal places | #|valid_grant_balance |number| Business Center valid coupon/voucher balance, rounded to two decimal places | #|payment_portfolio_type|string|The type of the Payment Portfolio.

Enum values:
  • `SHARED`: Advanced Payment Portfolio. For Advanced Payment Portfolios, funds are centrally managed and jointly used by all linked ad accounts.
  • `NON_SHARED`: Standard Payment Portfolio. For Standard Payment Portfolios, funds are individually managed for each linked ad account.
| ``` ### Example ``` xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": {} } (/code); ```
